data.name: ApiError_ClientTypeMismatch
data.value: The app type selected in Home Assistant does not match this app. Choose the DJConnect {0} setup flow in Home Assistant and try again.

data.name: ApiError_InvalidPairCode
data.value: The pairing code is not correct. Check the code in Home Assistant.

data.name: ApiError_InvalidClientType
data.value: The wrong app type was selected in Home Assistant. Choose the DJConnect {0} setup flow and use the new pairing code.

data.name: ApiError_NotConfigured
data.value: DJConnect is not configured in Home Assistant. Open the DJConnect integration there first.

data.name: ApiError_Unauthorized
data.value: Your pairing has expired. Pair DJConnect again to continue.

data.name: ApiError_StaleAuth
data.value: This pairing is no longer valid. Generate a new pairing code in Home Assistant and try again.

data.name: ApiError_StaleBackendAction
data.value: This action is from an older music session. Ask DJConnect for a fresh recommendation.

data.name: ApiError_UnsupportedBackendCapability
data.value: This music backend does not support that action.

data.name: ApiError_GenericPairing
data.value: Pairing failed. Check Home Assistant and try again.

data.name: ApiError_NetworkTimeout
data.value: Home Assistant did not respond in time. Check that this device is on the same network and try again.

data.name: ApiError_HostNotFound
data.value: Home Assistant was not found at this address. Check the hostname or IP address.

data.name: Pairing_InvalidUrl
data.value: Enter a valid local Home Assistant URL.

data.name: Pairing_InvalidCode
data.value: Enter the 6-digit pairing code from Home Assistant.

data.name: ApiError_GenericBackend
data.value: Home Assistant did not complete the request. Try again.

data.name: Format_UpdateRequiredDetail
data.value: Update DJConnect before continuing. This app requires Home Assistant DJConnect {0}.x.
